misc: Struggles with his gender identity, occasionally participating in events under his female alter-ego, "Eva".
biography: Marcus, representing Kurk Golf, is a deeply entrenched figure in the Hector Trophée. As the tournament prepares for its 2026 edition, he is set to make his unprecedented thirteenth appearance, a testament to an enduring commitment that spans the entire history of this esteemed pair competition. His remarkable longevity establishes him as one of the most consistent participants on the greens.

Across his twelve prior ventures onto the Hector Trophée stage, Marcus has displayed unwavering dedication and a resolute focus on the competition. Despite this sustained effort over more than a decade, the ultimate accolades 
— both the coveted Hector Trophée for his pairing and the individual Victor Trophy 
— have thus far remained just beyond his grasp. This persistent pursuit underscores the formidable challenge and elite competition inherent in the event.

Beyond the competitive scores, Marcus navigates a profound personal journey, occasionally gracing the greens under his female alter-ego, Eva. This aspect of his identity brings a unique dimension to his participation, showcasing a quiet courage and a willingness to express his authentic self amidst the pressures of competitive play. It adds a compelling layer to his character, making his presence truly distinctive within the tournament's history.

As he approaches his thirteenth outing, Marcus remains an active and dedicated participant in Hector events. The golfing community watches with keen interest, anticipating whether this seasoned competitor, with his unique narrative, will finally achieve his long-sought breakthrough and inscribe his name on one of the Hector Trophée's prestigious awards.
